# External Providers

OGX supports external providers that live outside of the main codebase. This allows you to:
- Create and maintain your own providers independently
- Share providers with others without contributing to the main codebase
- Keep provider-specific code separate from the core OGX code

## External Provider Documentation

- [Known External Providers](/docs/providers/external/external-providers-list)
- [Creating External Providers](/docs/providers/external/external-providers-guide)
